name: ACCENDRA HEALTH INC/VA/
summary: General Accendra Health,Inc. (f/k/a Owens & Minor, Inc.) and subsidiaries (Accendra Health, we, us, our or the Company) is a leading nationwide provider of products, technology, and services that supports health beyond the hospital for millions of people each year. We connect patients, providers, and insurers, delivering innovative solutions that help promote better health outcomes and improve quality of life for people living with chronic, complex, and acute health conditions.
